name: bistromath-realestate-tools
description: BistroMath Real Estate Tools — 8 skills for working agents: comps and pricing (comp-crusher), listing marketing (listing-arsenal), open houses (open-house-machine), sphere nurture (sphere-engine), prospecting (prospector) — written by Miron Briley/CyclSales (MIT) and repackaged with full credit — plus BistroMathWorks originals: newsletter-analyzer, presentation-strategist, and offer-extractor for mortgage client emails.
